transcript:
Agent: Welcome to JSON tech support.
Customer: Hi, my API is returning a 500 error.
Agent: Let me check the server logs for you.
Customer: It started happening after the new deployment 10 minutes ago.
Agent: Ah, I see the issue. The new deployment has a typo in the database connection string. Rolling it back now.

Agent: Hello, billing department.
Customer: I was double charged this month.
Agent: I apologize for that. Let me look up your account. Yes, I see two identical charges of $49.99. I am processing a refund for one of them right now.
Customer: Thank you, how long will it take?
Agent: It should appear on your statement in 3-5 business days.
